store_header.notes: n=18. cap_rel med 2.765 / stroke 2.085 IS the CVSpharmacy wordmark graphic — rendered as the logo overlay, never as scaled text. Non-logo header lines are body.

reg_line.notes: n=18. REG#/TRN#/CSHR#/STR# line prints slightly larger, normal weight (cap_rel med 1.125, stroke med 0.937).

extracare.notes: n=47. ExtraCare/ExtraBucks lines run bold-ish (stroke_rel med 1.117, p75 1.30): card # lines and offer headers are the bold sub-population.

pharmacy.notes: n=100. Vaccination/prescription copy is body weight (stroke med 1.052).

fsa.notes: n=16. FSA summary header + totals run semibold (stroke_rel med 1.152, p75 1.22).

total_line.notes: n=18. TOTAL/CHARGE block prints smaller than body (cap_rel med 0.897).

payment.notes: n=123. EMV/auth block prints smaller and lighter (cap_rel med 0.909, stroke med 0.925).

barcode_caption.notes: n=16. Barcode digit captions slightly larger (cap_rel med 1.093). Render-audit vs 8de52018: OCR-box sizing overshoots this line ~1.3x, sizeScale 0.9 recenters.

footer.notes: n=58. Body. (The giant $4-off coupon text is a graphic zone beyond stylemap scope.)
